description: Recto: Legal document (left side only) written on parchment by a Muslim notary, apparently in an official government office in the Sharqiyya district in lower Egypt (l. 4). Date (antepenultimate line): Shawwāl 494 (August 1101). Contains a Fatimid official's cipher-signature (ʿalāma) at the top, الحمد لله على نعمه (l. 2). Verso: 7–8 notations written at various angles relative to the writing on recto.
description_he: מסמך משפטי בערבית מהמאה ה-12. מוחזק באוסף מוסרי.
